name: Miami Special
preceding_figure_names: American Spin, Catapult, Change of Places Left to Right, Change of Places Right to Left, Chugging, Rolling Off the Arm, Shoulder Spin
following_figure_names: Hip Bump (normal; or Man turn 1/8 to R over steps 3-5, Lady 1/8 to L), Link, Change of Places Left to Right (Man turn 1/4 R over steps 3-6, Lady 1/2 to L)
notes:
Raise R hand and circle it strongly counterclockwise over Lady's head. At end of 5, continue to circle R hand strongly over own head. Place R hand on R shoulder. At same time place L hand on Lady's L shoulder blade.
Release hold with R hand. Gradually slide L hand along Lady's R arm to take L to R hand hold on step 8.

steps.action: Begin in Open Position, Right to Right hand hold; perform Link steps (1,2) with no turn.
Begin in Open Position, Left to Left hand hold; perform Link steps (1,2) with no turn.
Step LF to side, chasse LRL, turning underarm, ending with LF back slightly to side.
comments: Chasse LRL turning underarm, ending LF back slightly to side.

steps.action: Chasse turning underarm, RLR, ending in Left Side Position.
comments: Chasse turning underarm, RLR, ending in LSP.

steps.action: Side chasses RLR, ending in Left Side Position.
comments: Release hold with R hand; slide L hand down Lady's R arm to take L to R hand hold on step 8.

steps.action: Side chasses LRL, sliding R hand down Man's L arm until hand contact is gained, ending in LSP.
